title: Adanis: Kutsal Kavga
overview: The film focuses on events surrounding the sacred map, which is in the possession of the Devoted. The Devoted is a group formed to protect an important secret that fell into Turkish hands after the conquest of Istanbul. The Devoted, who are willing to risk everything to protect the secret, engage in a difficult struggle against the dark forces trying to seize it.
